name: Chinese Almond Cookies #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, soda, and salt in a bowl.
2. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal. Add the egg and almond extract; mix well.
3. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls and place them about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Place an almond atop each ball and gently press down to flatten slightly.
5. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 18 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
6. Cool on a wire rack.
